/usr/bin/ar qc libiniparser_lib.a  CMakeFiles/iniparser_lib.dir/example/iniexample.c.o CMakeFiles/iniparser_lib.dir/example/parse.c.o CMakeFiles/iniparser_lib.dir/src/dictionary.c.o CMakeFiles/iniparser_lib.dir/src/iniparser.c.o CMakeFiles/iniparser_lib.dir/test/CuTest.c.o CMakeFiles/iniparser_lib.dir/test/test_dictionary.c.o CMakeFiles/iniparser_lib.dir/test/test_iniparser.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libiniparser_lib.a
